response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue is in English, and there is no vocal music, matching the reference structure. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was fully used to understand the scene setup, but the spoken dialogue was transcribed manually as it consists entirely of original spoken content. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to speech onset, with fast-paced segments handled by logical phrasing breaks.

subtitles.original: Because my heart is too pure, and my ass is too fat...
subtitles.english: Because my heart is too pure, and my ass is too fat...

subtitles.original: ...and I'm not a gaslighter like Cecilia Immergreen.
subtitles.english: ...and I'm not a gaslighter like Cecilia Immergreen.

subtitles.english: I'm not very confident, but I'll do my best.

subtitles.original: Well, well, well, Elizabeth the criminal! We are about to begin your interrogation!
subtitles.english: Well, well, well, Elizabeth the criminal! We are about to begin your interrogation!

subtitles.original: Wait a minute, I'm not a criminal!
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, I'm not a criminal!

subtitles.original: Why me? I haven't done anything. What exactly have I been accused of?
subtitles.english: Why me? I haven't done anything. What exactly have I been accused of?

subtitles.original: Th-That would be the... suspected identity fraud, and...
subtitles.english: Th-That would be the... suspected identity fraud, and...

subtitles.original: Come on, Gigi!

subtitles.original: ...of Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: ...of Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.original: I don't know anything about that. I'm innocent. Who is Nerissa Ravencroft?
subtitles.english: I don't know anything about that. I'm innocent. Who is Nerissa Ravencroft?

subtitles.original: Have you ever seen Nerissa Ravencroft?
subtitles.english: Have you ever seen Nerissa Ravencroft?

subtitles.original: You know who Nerissa Ravencroft is!
subtitles.english: You know who Nerissa Ravencroft is!

subtitles.original: No, I've never seen her in my life.
subtitles.english: No, I've never seen her in my life.

subtitles.original: Blue, black, long hair? Red eyes?
subtitles.english: Blue, black, long hair? Red eyes?

subtitles.english: If I ever saw such a maiden, I would call her a princess.

subtitles.english: She sounds like one.

subtitles.original: Well, we have evidence, we have evidence, we have evidence.
subtitles.english: Well, we have evidence, we have evidence, we have evidence.

subtitles.original: Does the name "99_X3XD" ring a bell to you?
subtitles.english: Does the name "99_X3XD" ring a bell to you?

subtitles.english: Oh, yes! Because 99_X3XD is me.

subtitles.original: Huh!
subtitles.english: Huh!

subtitles.original: I knew it!
subtitles.english: I knew it!

subtitles.original: You are the prime suspect in the stalking incident!
subtitles.english: You are the prime suspect in the stalking incident!

subtitles.original: Of Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: Of Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.english: And we have all the chat logs that you put in Nerissa Ravencroft's channel right here.

subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, I'm outside of your house right now.

subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, I see you from the window.

subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft, take off your shirt.

subtitles.original: Whoa, now...

subtitles.original: That was also you!
subtitles.english: That was also you!

subtitles.original: I don't know about that. I think you're mistaken. I would never speak that way to a princess.
subtitles.english: I don't know about that. I think you're mistaken. I would never speak that way to a princess.

subtitles.original: Tell her that we're never going to give her donuts ever again.
subtitles.english: Tell her that we're never going to give her donuts ever again.

subtitles.english: And you will never have donuts ever again.

subtitles.english: And I would have never... Donuts? How did you know I like donuts?

subtitles.original: No more donuts! No more donuts.
subtitles.english: No more donuts! No more donuts.

subtitles.original: But, if you just confess, we have an in with Nerissa Ravencroft.
subtitles.english: But, if you just confess, we have an in with Nerissa Ravencroft.

subtitles.english: Yeah, offer a good deal, Gigi!

subtitles.english: A date with Nerissa Ravencroft!

subtitles.english: Okay, now you guys switch roles. Gigi is the bad cop...

subtitles.original: I'm scared!

subtitles.original: Chief Raora! Oh, Chief Raora!
subtitles.english: Chief Raora! Oh, Chief Raora!

subtitles.original: What do you guys think you're doing, huh?
subtitles.english: What do you guys think you're doing, huh?

subtitles.original: I was doing what you were saying.

subtitles.original: You useless! You don't do anything in this place!
subtitles.english: You useless! You don't do anything in this place!

subtitles.english: Why did I hire you, huh? You're so useless!

subtitles.english: This person, we have all the evidence, and you still didn't manage to make her tell the truth!

subtitles.english: Chief, we are trying our best, okay? We are underpaid, overworked!

subtitles.english: You're embarrassing us in front of the criminal.

subtitles.original: Well, maybe you should do better than this!
subtitles.english: Well, maybe you should do better than this!

subtitles.english: You're humiliating us. You're not even listening to me, are you?

subtitles.english: You never fixed our coffee machine! And we never get free time off, Raora!

subtitles.english: Well, if you work more, maybe you will deserve your coffee machine!

subtitles.english: Well, your own story with Nerissa Ravencroft, by any chance?

subtitles.original: Thank you. Thank you. Thank thank...

subtitles.original: So you do know Nerissa Ravencroft!
subtitles.english: So you do know Nerissa Ravencroft!
